body: This PR adds some dependencies. This is a peel off from #1516.
title: Add some dependencies

body:
## Purpose 
This PR adds a modified Config 5 (refer to SDI #1310  to see the different Configs) that was just requested. It modifies upwinding jobs so that we don't upwind tracers, energy, and density, but only tracers and energy.

Closes #1559 

## Content
- Modified relevant first-order and third-order upwinding jobs to regular CI pipeline (as discussed earlier, the third-order upwinding jobs will be modified with `zalesak` upwinding when instabilities will be cleared out with that operator).
- Modified MSE tables

Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.


- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: CI pipeline: Add tracer and energy upwinding jobs
